title: rostellularia humilis
intro: Rostellularia humilis, also known as Blue Devil, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues. Rostellularia humilis can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
